chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-1733 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 19294/16 2. For orders on office objection 3. For Katcha Peshi. 4. For hearing of M.A 15570/16 14.12.2016. None present for petitioners. Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Kazi, Assistant A.G. -.-.-. Today, parawise comments have been filed by the learned A.A.G, according to which, earlier a habeas corpus petition filed by respondent No.3 (Teekam Bheel) was allowed and detainees were recovered from the custody of petitioner. It appears that matter between the parties hereto is of cultivation of agricultural land for which proper forum is available under the law. However, the restraining order passed on 01.11.2016 that respondents will not cause any harassment to the petitioners is hereby confirmed and the present petition is disposed of accordingly alongwith listed applications. JUDGE

However, the restraining order passed on 01.11.2016 that respondents will not cause any harassment to the petitioners is hereby confirmed and the present petition is disposed of accordingly alongwith listed applications. JUDGE ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-1695 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of MA 14925/16 3. For Katcha Peshi. 14.12.2016. None present for petitioner. Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Kazi, Assistant A.G. Mr. Habib-ur-Rehman, Assistant Director (Legal), NADRA. Respondent No.6 present in person. -.-.-. Today, Assistant Director (Legal), NADRA, has submitted a report on behalf of NADRA with regard to petitioner, which is taken on record. Since petitioner is not in attendance, who was appearing in person, therefore, no object will be served to keep pending this matter, which is accordingly disposed of alongwith listed application. JUDGE Ali Haider

Since petitioner is not in attendance, who was appearing in person, therefore, no object will be served to keep pending this matter, which is accordingly disposed of alongwith listed application. JUDGE Ali Haider ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-335 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Katcha Peshi. 2. For hearing of MA 4837/16 14.12.2016. Mr. Muhammad Ishaque Khoso, Advocate for respondent No.3. -.-.-. None present for the petitioner nor there is any intimation for such an absence. Mr. Muhammad Ishaque Khoso, the learned Counsel for respondent No.3, has pointed out the last order of 23.11.2016. Today, no definite statement has been made on behalf of petitioner, as directed in the last order and that is why a fixed date and time was fixed. Consequently, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed application. JUDGE Ali Haider

Consequently, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed application. JUDGE Ali Haider ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-1630 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 14.12.2016. None present for petitioners. Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Kazi, Assistant A.G. -.-.-. Learned A.A.G requests that a short time be given, as the last order has not been received in A.A.G’s office. Office is directed to fax and email the order of 05.12.2016 to A.A.G’s office as well as to the concerned SSP Shaheed Benazirabad. In this regard, Additional Registrar of this Court will ensure that the order is properly communicated by obtaining an acknowledgment receipt. If on next date of hearing ASI Ghulam Qadir Jalbani fails to appear, then without passing any further order Non-Bailable Warrant will be issued against him. To come up on 19.12.2016 at 12:00 noon JUDGE Ali Haider
